Land2Living

Transfer Completion Certificate

Transfer Ref: TRF-____-____-___
Date: ________________________

This is to certify that the transfer of occupancy rights for the stand described below has been completed in accordance with communal land administration procedures.

Stand / property:
Stand local reference:
Seller (previous occupant):
Buyer (new occupant):
Sale amount (ZAR):
Transfer date:

Previous PTO reference: (now superseded)
New PTO reference:

The Council hereby confirms that:

  1. The seller held a valid PTO for the above stand at the time of sale.
  2. The sale was conducted in accordance with council bylaws and L2L platform terms.
  3. Payment of the full sale amount has been received and released to the seller.
  4. The old PTO is hereby superseded. The buyer is recognised as the new lawful occupant.
  5. A new PTO has been issued to the buyer under the reference noted above.
Council Secretary — full name & signature
Chairperson / Founder — full name & signature
Seller acknowledgement & date
Buyer acknowledgement & date
OFFICIAL COUNCIL SEAL
Office use: Back-entered into L2L system:   Completed by:
